problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: If Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
